headline: Jim Cramer Provides the “Bear Case” for Paychex, Inc. (PAYX)
summary: Paychex, Inc. (NASDAQ:PAYX) was featured on Mad Money as Jim Cramer shared his take on the stock amid a sliding macro environment. Cramer highlighted the CEO’s thoughts on the company as he said: I’m calling it the macro morass. That’s what we’re experiencing right now with so many not-so-hot stocks of very good companies. Case […]
